content.description:
Emergency recovery interface activated via `?safe=1` URL parameter. Provides a minimal UI for fixing broken code items when normal rendering fails.

## Activation

Access safe mode by:
- Adding `?safe=1` to the URL
- Pressing `Ctrl+Shift+S` from anywhere (hardcoded kernel shortcut)

## Capabilities

- **View All Items**: Browse complete item list sorted by name
- **View Code Items**: Filter to only executable items (renderers, libraries, views)
- **Edit as JSON**: Raw JSON editing with syntax validation
- **Delete Items**: Remove problematic items (with confirmation)
- **Export Data**: Download all items as JSON backup
- **Import Data**: Restore items from backup (skips existing IDs)
- **Reset System**: Nuclear option - deletes everything except seed items

## When to Use

- Renderer throwing errors prevents normal UI from loading
- Need to edit code items without executing them
- System is in an inconsistent state after failed import
- Want to inspect raw item structure
